recommendations: Structure and Formatting: Break up the content into smaller paragraphs to improve readability. Use headings to separate sections and emphasize key points.

Hashtag Usage and Relevance: Use a mix of niche-specific hashtags (e.g., #HumanCentredAI, #ResponsibleAI) and broader industry-related hashtags (e.g., #ArtificialIntelligence, #MachineLearning). Research and use relevant hashtags to increase discoverability.

Engagement Potential and Analytics: Add a clear call-to-action (CTA) in the main content or wrap-up section to encourage engagement. Consider asking questions or requesting feedback from readers to boost interaction.
People Tagging Strategy: Tag relevant individuals, especially Mr. Somjit Amrit and the panelists, to increase visibility and potential engagement from their networks.

Keyword Optimization, SEO Alignment, Tone Analysis, and Trending Words: Use a more conversational tone and incorporate industry-related keywords (e.g., #AIethics, #digitaltransformation) to improve SEO alignment. Identify and include trending words or phrases related to AI and its applications.

Readability and Flow: Ensure the content is concise and easy to read by breaking up long paragraphs and using subheadings to separate ideas. Avoid excessive use of bold text and emojis, which can be distracting.
Use niche hashtags like #B2BContentStrategy, #AIethics, and #ResponsibleInnovation to attract targeted audience.
Add 1-2 more relevant hashtags to reach the optimal range of 3-5 hashtags per post.
Consider using a mix of long-tail keywords (#HumanCentredArtificialIntelligence) and broad hashtags (#AI) for better discovery.
Use a consistent tone and language throughout the post, avoiding jargon and technical terms that might confuse the audience.

strengths: Use of emojis and visual elements
weaknesses: Lengthy content, may be overwhelming for readers
improvement_suggestions: Break up the text into smaller sections or bullet points to improve readability
